function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-11-03
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-03                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

function.message: Completed the next inbox request. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md` by adding invoice YAML frontmatter with required fields (`record_type`, `invoice_number`, `alias`, `issued_on`, `total_eur`, `counterparty`, `project`, `lines`) plus optional `related_entity`, using only visible note data. I preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter and kept the diff focused. Then I deleted the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, read nested AGENTS for inbox and finance lanes, preserved original body exactly during frontmatter migration, and removed inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on a specific invoice note. The target note contained all required invoice schema fields and line items, enabling exact extraction without guessing. File update succeeded and the processed inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write migrated frontmatter to target invoice file
